author: mark
text:
fix: handle bl review on --no-worktree-claimed tasks

cmd_review branched only on store.no_git, so a task claimed with --no-worktree in a git repo entered review_worktree and spawned git in a .balls-worktrees/<id> that was never created, failing with 'failed to spawn git: No such file or directory'.

Worktree-less claims (no task.branch) now take the same metadata-only status flip as no-git mode; the close path already no-ops a missing worktree, so claim -> review -> close completes end to end.
